questionHtml: State the conclusion of the test in context, justifying your answer.
markschemeHtml:
0.134>0.1,          R1

(so do not reject H0)

there is insufficient evidence to suggest that the darts players’ averages have increased          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1. Award A0 if the conclusion is not in context or if the null hypothesis was logically incorrect (i.e. an error of confusing null and alternative rather than just an error in communication).

[2 marks]

meta.title: State the conclusion of the test in context, justifying your answer.
